dsl_rule.translation_notes: Pivot Point Reverse Trading System: BUY when price closes above support level (s1, interpreted as pivot point bottom) AND close > previous close. SELL when price closes below resistance level (r1, interpreted as pivot point top) AND close < previous close. Used pivot, r1, s1 indicators to represent pivot point levels. The three-bar pivot formation is implicit in standard pivot calculations.

backtest_rule.reason: Pivot Point Reverse Trading System: BUY when price closes above support level (s1, interpreted as pivot point bottom) AND close > previous close. SELL when price closes below resistance level (r1, interpreted as pivot point top) AND close < previous close. Used pivot, r1, s1 indicators to represent pivot point levels. The three-bar pivot formation is implicit in standard pivot calculations.

source_rule_text: Buy when a pivot point bottom occurs and the close is higher than the previous close; Sell when a pivot point top occurs and the close is lower than the previous close.
